text: As I gaze through the glass into this space filled with glowing screens and bold lettering—R+D—I feel both curiosity and a subtle unease. There’s a sense of sterile modernity, an environment shaped by research and technology. The purpose-driven design feels almost clinical, but it intrigues me. I wonder about the interplay between innovation and human experience, feeling both the call of progress and the cool distance it sometimes imposes. I am both observer and participant, straddling the boundary between inquiry and alienation.
